project_type: Next.js 15 App Router monorepo with Prisma ORM, Tailwind CSS
build_system: npm workspaces + turbo. Web app in apps/web/. Key command prefix: npm run --prefix apps/web
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests (Node test runner). Tests in apps/web/tests/. Playwright for e2e.
build_command: cd apps/web && npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run prisma generate to validate schema. 2. Run next build (or next lint). 3. Run unit tests.
snapshot_or_generated_files: apps/web/node_modules/.prisma/client is generated by prisma generate. Not checked in.
setup_instructions: cd apps/web && npm install (monorepo root already has node_modules)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. No database available for runtime tests. Use AST/build validation. TypeScript compilation is the main validation.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns.
key_patterns: Feature flags: FeatureFlag model (id, key, enabled, config Json). Seed via upsert in prisma/seed.ts. Admin UI in components/admin/feature-flag-settings.tsx with FLAG_META for labels/descriptions. API at /api/feature-flags (GET/PUT). Mobile API at /api/mobile/v1/feature-flags. ETA logic in lib/live-order.ts (estimateOrderEta). Tracking page: app/track/[id]/page.tsx -> components/tracking/live-order-tracking.tsx -> components/tracking/delivery-map.tsx. Map uses maplibre-gl with OpenFreeMap tiles.
directory_structure: Monorepo root: apps/web (Next.js), apps/mobile-staff (Expo). apps/web/app/ has route groups. apps/web/components/ has UI. apps/web/lib/ has utils. apps/web/prisma/ has schema and seed.
